description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build for Windows that runs on push to master and ci/windows branches, on pull requests to those branches, and on published releases. Use a Windows 2022 job with a matrix strategy for win32 and win64 architectures. For each architecture, check out the repository with submodules, install Qt 5.15.2, adjust the PATH, build firebird-emu using qmake and mingw32-make, and upload the resulting build as a zip artifact.
